senses.definition_dg: Mbii, isiyo ndzuri.

examples.en: A bad tree

senses.definition_en: tsetse fly, causes sleeping sickness (Glossina palidipes)
senses.definition_dg: Dudu anayengʼata na kurehera ukongo wa kulala, mbungʼo.

examples.dg: Ibu ni dudu wa hatari anayeishi tsakani.
examples.en: The tsetse fly is a dangerous insect that lives in the bush.
examples.sw: Mbung'o ni mdudu hatari anayeishi porini.

senses.definition_en: if, when (verb form if it be)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa hali, ikiwa.

examples.en: If it rains, we will stay home.

senses.definition_en: ni m, kpwa hivyo mgbwanga na mganga gosi ni maneno ambago
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu maneno ga Chidigo na mahumizi gao.

examples.dg: Maneno ga Chidigo gana maana tofauti ichilungizirwa.
examples.en: Digo words have different meanings depending on context.
examples.sw: Maneno ya Kidigo yana maana tofauti kulingana na muktadha.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya ofisi au shirika yenye kazi maalumu.

examples.dg: Idara ya afya inasira kazi vinono.
examples.en: The health department works well.
examples.sw: Idara ya afya inafanya kazi vizuri.

senses.definition_dg: Huduma, kazi ya kuterya atu.

examples.en: The radio service broadcasts the news.

equivalents_en: stomach where an animal stores food before chewing the cud
equivalents_sw: sehemu ya tumbo ya mnyama ambayo huifadhi nyasi kabla hazijatafunwa

senses.definition_en: stomach where an animal stores food before chewing the cud
senses.definition_sw: sehemu ya tumbo ya mnyama ambayo huifadhi nyasi kabla hazijatafunwa
senses.definition_dg: Ngumu, chenye nguvu, kisichoweza kuvundzika rahisi.

examples.en: A hard back doesn't break.

senses.definition_dg: Ngumu, chenye nguvu, kisichoweza kuvundzika rahisi.

examples.en: A solid branch is not easily broken
A hard/strong tree

examples.dg: Papa mufu na nazi nyifu ni mtswano sana
examples.en: Dried shark and dessicated coconut is very tasty

senses.definition_dg: Kufwanana na mutu au chitu, kuiga.

examples.dg: Mwanache anaiga babaye kpwa kuhenda mambo.
examples.en: The child imitates his father in doing things.
examples.sw: Mtoto anaiga baba yake kwa kufanya mambo.

senses.definition_en: to copy, to imitate, to ape
senses.definition_dg: Kuiga mutu au chitu, kunakili.

examples.en: The child copies his sibling in speaking.
examples.sw: Mtoto anaigiza ndugu yake kwa kusema.

senses.definition_dg: Kufwanana, kukala na sura mwenga.

examples.en: These two children resemble each other a lot.

senses.definition_en: to copy, to imitate, to ape
senses.definition_dg: Kuiga mutu, kunakili mambo ga mutu munjine.

examples.en: The child imitates the teacher in the play.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuiha mutu, kupiga kelele ili mutu akpwedze.

examples.en: Call Bakari to come here.

senses.definition_dg: Kujibu mutu anayekuiha, kuitika.

examples.en: When he was called, he responded with a loud voice.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya tsano ya wiki.

examples.dg: Aisilamu anji nkuswali siku ya Ijumaa
examples.en: Many muslims go for prayers on Fridays
examples.sw: Waislamu wengi huswali siku ya Ijumaa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu phatu, kuweka.

examples.en: Put the books on the table.

senses.definition_dg: Kupiga sauti ya jogolo (kuhusu jogolo tu).

examples.dg: Jogolo anaika kpwa mbingu na mbingu.
examples.en: The rooster crows at dawn.

senses.definition_dg: Kutikisa chitswa kuonyesa 'ndiyo'.

examples.dg: Mutu hiyu, uchimuuza swali, kagomba na mromo, lakini ahenda ikiza
examples.en: When you ask this man a question, he doesn't speak with his mouth, but he nods
examples.sw: Mtu huyu ukimuuliza swali hasemi kwa mdomo, lakini anatikisa kichwa.

senses.definition_dg: Chirema au kosa kpwenye chitu, dosari.

examples.en: Every person has their own fault.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuunganisha maneno kuonyesa kukala chitu chisikale na dosari.

examples.dg: Henda vinono ili ipho usikale na ila.
examples.en: Do well so that you won't have a fault.
examples.sw: Fanya vizuri ili usiwe na ila.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuonyesa sababu, ili.

examples.en: Study well so that you succeed.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na elimu, kuelimika.

examples.en: An educated person knows many things.

senses.definition_dg: Maarifa ganayophahikana kpwa kusoma na kufundzwa.

examples.en: Education is the key to life.

senses.definition_dg: Kusimama, au kusimamisha chitu.

examples.en: Stand here, don't go anywhere.

examples.dg: Imamu nkuadhini kabla ya atu kuinjira msikitini
examples.en: The imam calls people to prayers before they enter the mosque

senses.definition_dg: Nguvu, ugumu, hali ya kutokuvundzika.

examples.dg: Imara ya muhi uhu ni kulu sana.
examples.en: The strength of this tree is very great.
examples.sw: Imara ya mti huu ni kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Chenye nguvu, kisichoweza kuvundzika.

examples.dg: Nyumba hino ni imara, taiweza kugbwa.
examples.en: This house is strong, it cannot fall.
examples.sw: Nyumba hii ni imara, haiwezi kuanguka.

senses.definition_dg: Kuimba wimbo kpwa sauti.

examples.en: The children are singing a happy song.

senses.definition_dg: Maimbi ga bahari, madzi ganayokpwedza na kuuyira.

examples.dg: Maimbi ga bahari ni makulu rero.
examples.en: The sea waves are big today.
examples.sw: Mawimbi ya bahari ni makubwa leo.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mdide anayengʼata usiku na kurehera ukongo wa malaria.

examples.dg: Imbu ni dudu wa hatari, anahendesa malaria.
examples.en: The mosquito is a dangerous insect, it causes malaria.
examples.sw: Mbu ni mdudu hatari, anasababisha malaria.

senses.definition_dg: Kulinda chitu au mutu, kuimira.

examples.en: The guard watches over the house at night.

senses.definition_en: to represent, to vie for, to contest, to stand for (e.g. an election)
senses.definition_dg: Kuwakilisha atu, kupigania nafasi kpwenye uchaguzi.

examples.dg: Waimira atu a mudziwe kpwenye uchaguzi.
examples.en: He represented his village people in the election.
examples.sw: Aliwakilisha watu wa kijiji chake kwenye uchaguzi.

senses.definition_dg: Kusimamia kazi au atu, kulola ichikala mambo ganaendelea vinono.

examples.dg: Mwalimu anaimirira anache wakati wa mtihani.
examples.en: The teacher supervises the children during the exam.
examples.sw: Mwalimu anasimamia watoto wakati wa mtihani.

senses.definition_en: to erect, to make something stop
senses.definition_dg: Kusimamisha chitu, kuhendesa chitu chisimame au chiime.

examples.en: Erect the pole so it doesn't fall.

senses.definition_dg: Kusimika, kukala na nguvu ya mwiri wa chilume.

examples.dg: Ni dzambo ra chisayansi kuhusu mwiri wa mutu.
examples.en: It is a scientific matter about the human body.
examples.sw: Ni jambo la kisayansi kuhusu mwili wa mtu.

equivalents_en: dza mahumizi ga Chiswahili (mfwano ni hakika) lakini wakati wanjina

senses.definition_en: dza mahumizi ga Chiswahili (mfwano ni hakika) lakini wakati wanjina
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu namna neno rinavyotamkwa kpwenye Chidigo.

examples.dg: Neno hiri rinahadzwa dza kpwenye Chiswahili.
examples.en: This word is pronounced like in Swahili.
examples.sw: Neno hili linatamkwa kama katika Kiswahili.

senses.definition_en: neno renye rinavyohadzwa, na b) aandishi anjina kandaweza kumanya vira
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi kuhusu maandishi ga Chidigo.

examples.dg: Alama hino inaonyesa namna ya kugomba neno.
examples.en: This mark shows how to pronounce the word.
examples.sw: Alama hii inaonyesha jinsi ya kutamka neno.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kuambia atu mphiye, twende.

examples.en: Let's go, we'll be late!

senses.definition_dg: Kuindza nyama tsakani, kuwinda.

examples.dg: Kuindza simba ni kazi ngumu na ya hatari
examples.en: Hunting a lion is a difficult and dangerous job
examples.sw: Kuwinda simba ni kazi ngumu na hatari.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu anayeishi nyumbani anayeenenda kpwenye chakurya na uchafu.

examples.en: Flies eat dirty food.

equivalents_en: kutsekera (of a baby) to make the first smile
equivalents_sw: kufanya kicheko cha mwanzo cha mtoto

senses.definition_en: , kutsekera (of a baby) to make the first smile
senses.definition_sw: kufanya kicheko cha mwanzo cha mtoto
senses.definition_dg: Kucheka kpwa kpwandza kpwa mwanache mdide.

examples.en: The baby made its first smile.
examples.sw: Mtoto alifanya kicheko chake cha kwanza.

senses.definition_en: to scare away birds e.g. chickens
senses.definition_dg: Kutsukuza nyama wa kuruha au kuku kpwa kupiga kelele ili auke.

examples.en: Scare away the chickens so they don't enter the house!

senses.definition_dg: Hata ichikala, dzaguo.

examples.dg: Ingawa ni maskini, ela ana moyo mnono.
examples.en: Although he is poor, he has a good heart.
examples.sw: Ingawa ni maskini, lakini ana moyo mzuri.

examples.dg: Proverb: Dalili ya mvula ni maingu
examples.en: The sign of rain is clouds

senses.definition_dg: Kuvundza moyo wa mutu, kumtiya mtu woga asihende chitu.

examples.dg: Usimoche ini mwanache, mterye badala yache.
examples.en: Don't discourage the child, help him instead.
examples.sw: Usimvunje moyo mtoto, msaidie badala yake.

senses.definition_dg: Rangi ya udhurungi, kahi-kahi ya mweusi na mwekundu.

examples.dg: Ana nguo ya rangi ya ini.
examples.en: He has a dark brown colored garment.
examples.sw: Ana nguo ya rangi ya udhurungi.

senses.definition_dg: Kuinjira ndani, kuphiya ndani ya nyumba au phatu.

examples.en: Enter inside, don't stand outside.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu anayeishi nyumbani anayerya uchafu, indzi.

examples.dg: Inzi anazola kpwenye chakurya, chitiye chifwiniko.
examples.en: Flies land on food, cover it.

senses.definition_dg: Kudharauriwa ni atu, kutolewa heshima.

examples.dg: Usimiphe mutu kpwa sababu ya umaskini.
examples.en: Don't despise a person because of poverty.
examples.sw: Usimdharau mtu kwa sababu ya umaskini.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra nyama au wadudu wa katikati.

examples.en: Swarms of locusts are coming.

equivalents_en: ivwa-ivwa wadudu. Maipho ga ndzije garedza. Swarms of locusts are coming

senses.definition_en: ivwa-ivwa wadudu. Maipho ga ndzije garedza. Swarms of locusts are coming
senses.definition_dg: Angaliya ipho. Kundi ra wadudu.

examples.en: A swarm of bees is coming.

senses.definition_dg: Uvimbe wenye usaha unaomera kpwenye ngozi.

examples.en: A boil grew on his leg.

senses.definition_dg: Kuandza kuchemka (kuhusu madzi au mchuzi).

examples.en: The water has started boiling, add the flour now.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na achili pungufu, kuwa na wazimu.

examples.en: That person is insane, don't listen to him.

senses.definition_dg: Chenye ure, mure au chire.

examples.en: A tall person
examples.sw: Mti huu ni mrefu sana, unafika angani.

examples.en: A long road
examples.sw: Mti huu ni mrefu sana, unafika angani.

equivalents_en: gain favour or popularity with people

senses.definition_en: to gain favour or popularity with people
senses.definition_dg: Kupata heshima na kupendwa ni atu.

examples.dg: Mutu yuya wairima kpwa sababu ya ufazi wake.
examples.en: That person gained favor because of his generosity.
examples.sw: Mtu yule alipendwa kwa sababu ya ukarimu wake.

sub_entries.definition_sw: maji meusi (yaani maji mengi usioweza kuona chini)

equivalents_en: seek the return of a loan

senses.definition_en: to seek the return of a loan
senses.definition_dg: Kudai fedha au chitu ambacho mutu wanjine anakudaiwa.

examples.dg: Wamisa deni rakege kpwa muda mure.
examples.en: He sought the return of his debt for a long time.
examples.sw: Alidai deni lake kwa muda mrefu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhesabu nambari, kupiga hesabu.

examples.dg: Mwanache anaisabu nambari kula mwenga hadi kumi.
examples.en: The child is counting numbers from one to ten.
examples.sw: Mtoto anahesabu nambari kutoka moja hadi kumi.

senses.definition_dg: Baba wa mutu munjine.

examples.dg: Ise wa Bakari ni mutu wa heshima.
examples.en: Bakari's father is a respected person.
examples.sw: Baba wa Bakari ni mtu wa heshima.

senses.definition_en: polite way of referring to a man who has at least one child
senses.definition_dg: Njira ya heshima ya kumuiha mlume ariye na mwanache.

examples.en: Father of Juma, come here.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya ise. Neno ranjine ra baba.

examples.dg: Isengbwa ni neno ra heshima ra kumuiha mutu.
examples.en: Isengbwa is a respectful way of addressing someone.
examples.sw: Isengbwa ni neno la heshima la kumtaja mtu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuishi, kukala hai.

examples.dg: Atu osi anamendza kuishi kpwa amani.
examples.en: All people want to live in peace.
examples.sw: Watu wote wanapenda kuishi kwa amani.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kumuheshimu mutu, heshima.

examples.dg: Mutu wa ishima anaisimishwa ni atu osi.
examples.en: A respectful person is respected by everyone.
examples.sw: Mtu wa heshima anaheshimiwa na watu wote.

senses.definition_dg: Kumuheshimu mutu, kumuhendere heshima.

examples.dg: Ishimu avyazio, ni amri ya Mulungu.
examples.en: Respect your parents, it is God's command.
examples.sw: Heshimu wazazi wako, ni amri ya Mungu.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari ya mirongo miiri, bada ya kumi na tisiya.

examples.en: He is twenty years old.

senses.definition_dg: Isipokuwa, piya kuika nje ya, kuepuka.

examples.en: Everyone came except Bakari.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariyefwa, mzoga wa mutu.

examples.en: The corpse was prepared before burial.
examples.sw: Mwili wa marehemu uliandaliwa kabla ya mazishi.

senses.definition_dg: Ambacho taridzangbweiva au kupikpwa, bichi.

examples.en: Don't eat raw meat, cook it first.

equivalents_en: unable to do something because of weakness
equivalents_sw: hali ya kutoweza kufanya jambo fulani kwa sababu ya unyonge

senses.definition_en: unable to do something because of weakness, laziness or lack of desire
senses.definition_sw: hali ya kutoweza kufanya jambo fulani kwa sababu ya unyonge, uvivu ama kukosa hamu
senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kushindwa kuhenda chitu kpwa sababu ya unyonge, uvivu au kukosa hamu.

examples.dg: Mwanache ana itsi-itsi, kamanya kuhenda chochosi.
examples.en: The child is listless, he can't do anything.
examples.sw: Mtoto ana hali ya kutoweza, hawezi kufanya chochote.

examples.en: You are chasing away the dogs from the ashes you aren't sleeping in

senses.definition_dg: Kuiva, kukala tunda au chakurya chikakomala na kukala tayari kurwa.

examples.en: The mango has ripened, you can eat it.

senses.definition_dg: Kudziingiza kpwenye mambo ga atu anjine.

examples.en: Don't meddle in other people's affairs.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya jeke-jeke.

examples.dg: Iya ni neno ranjine ra jeke-jeke.
examples.en: Iya is another word for jeke-jeke.
examples.sw: Iya ni neno jingine la jeke-jeke.

senses.definition_dg: Kuiya, kuhala chitu cha mutu bila ruhusa.

examples.dg: Usiiye mali ya mutu, ni kosa.
examples.en: Don't steal someone's property, it is wrong.
examples.sw: Usiibe mali ya mtu, ni kosa.

senses.definition_dg: Yeye, neno ra kumuonyesa mutu mmwenga.

examples.en: He/she is the one who told me.

senses.definition_en: heap of refuse, usually referring to garden rubbish
senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra uchafu au takataka za mundani.

examples.en: Burn the garden refuse.

senses.definition_dg: Kusumbua mutu, kumzuwiya kuhenda mambo gakege.

examples.en: Don't disturb your sibling, let him work.
examples.sw: Usimsumbue ndugu yako, mwache afanye kazi.

senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra mugomba ambaro rinarwa na binadamu.

examples.en: The bananas have ripened, let's pick them.
